name: Ben Carson
subject: HUGE NEWS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31167156:sgrRJ5mN7:m:1:876315805:CDC65A69FD5E1D54648B5D7B53BC5C51:r)
---
|

Peter,

This is huge news -- **we've just taken the lead in Iowa.**

A brand new poll was just released this morning from Quinnipiac University, and I've jumped ahead of Republican frontrunner Donald Trump by eight points, 28% to 20%.

As the state that holds the very first vote, Iowa is critical to our success -- and up until this morning no major survey has shown me in the lead there.

**I need your help to mark this special occasion -- will you make a quick donation?**

**[If you give $5 or more, you'll not only help to fuel our momentum, but you'll be automatically entered into our sweepstakes for a chance to join me on the campaign trail for a private, one-on-one lunch. ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31167156:sgrRJ5mN7:m:1:876315805:CDC65A69FD5E1D54648B5D7B53BC5C51:r)**

Peter, we are making incredible progress. Something historic is happening across the country. The professional political class doesn't seem to understand it, but I can feel it.

Thank you for your faith in me, and your dedication to saving our great nation.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS SWEEPSTAKES** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this sweepstakes. You may enter sweepstakes without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31167157:sgrRJ5mN7:m:1:876315805:CDC65A69FD5E1D54648B5D7B53BC5C51:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "LUNCH WITH BEN" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31167158:sgrRJ5mN7:m:1:876315805:CDC65A69FD5E1D54648B5D7B53BC5C51:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to a yet-to-be determined location of the committee's choosing, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This sweepstakes is sponsored by Carson America, Inc. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

---

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Wow 😮
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
They say that imitation is the sincerest form of flattery. Hillary Clinton appears to very much be taking that to heart...

Last week we did our first bus tour through New Hampshire on the "**Kasich For Us Bus** ".

We concluded the bus tour with Governor Kasich's plan to "**Balance the Budget for Us** " \- to get "**Results. Now. For Us.** "

Now Hillary's SuperPAC is out with a new ad ending with the same slogan "**For Us.** "

**Peter, we know Hillary isn't for us**. [She thinks Republicans are the enemy](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31168214:srhDP5mFN:m:1:958431888:699FB425CEDE1280FB622B2A05D9A806:r).

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31168214:srhDP5mFN:m:1:958431888:699FB425CEDE1280FB622B2A05D9A806:r)

Hillary and the Democrats believe that John Kasich is the enemy. Polling shows Governor Kasich as the Republican most likely to defeat Hillary. Hillary's friends and advisers have said the same thing.

The Clinton's and their allies have millions of dollars at their disposal. **They know they can't beat Governor Kasich, so they are trying to steal the Governor's message**.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100 or more to help us get our message out and beat the Clinton machine?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31168214:srhDP5mFN:m:1:958431888:699FB425CEDE1280FB622B2A05D9A806:r)

John Kasich is the only candidate with a plan to balance the budget, lower taxes and restore economic growth for our country. **He's for all of us**.

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31168215:srhDP5mFN:m:1:958431888:699FB425CEDE1280FB622B2A05D9A806:r)

[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31168216:srhDP5mFN:m:1:958431888:699FB425CEDE1280FB622B2A05D9A806:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31168217:srhDP5mFN:m:1:958431888:699FB425CEDE1280FB622B2A05D9A806:r)
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31168218:srhDP5mFN:m:1:958431888:699FB425CEDE1280FB622B2A05D9A806:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: New Poll: You won't hear this in the media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Our momentum is growing.

After winning the biggest straw poll in New Hampshire, a new poll shows my campaign in 3rd place with committed New Hampshire voters.

Another poll today shows me surging to 4th place in Iowa -- less than a week after my Students for Rand college tour to rally 10,000 students to caucus for my campaign.

Both of those polls are on top of a newly released CNN poll that shows me rising to 5th place nationally.

**[Can I count on you to help me build on this momentum by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176976:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r)**?

I've won a three-for-three clean sweep in the biggest and most significant straw polls for the presidential race in 2015.

But you won't hear about our success in the media because I'm not "their guy."

And, Fellow Conservative, I never will be.

But the media can no longer ignore or hide the strength of our movement and the grassroots infrastructure of my campaign.

That's why my TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa was so important.

And thanks to the overwhelming support of thousands of patriots like you, my campaign is set to pepper the airwaves during and after the third presidential debate -- allowing me to break the media's stranglehold and directly reach the voters with my message of Liberty.

But I'm not taking anything for granted. And I hope you won't either.

I'm not selling my campaign to Wall Street lobbyists or fat-cat billionaires. My campaign is fueled and funded by grassroots supporters like you.

**[So if you're with me in this fight for the long haul to defeat the Washington Machine and take our country back, I need you to chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176976:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r)**.

This race could not be more wide open. So every dollar counts.

Thank you, Fellow Conservative, for your continued support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176977:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176978:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176979:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176980:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176976:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176981:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176982:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31176983:sOWe05mEN:m:1:879035888:370977B0BE1E22DB98AFCCBE261F86F1:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Monica B.
subject: Were you on the Debate Team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
Governor Christie is hard at work prepping for next week's Republican debate. This will be a great opportunity for the Governor to reinforce that this campaign isn't about him or the other candidates, but it's about you and the American people.

As he preps for next week, I want him to know that he's got a team supporting him. So, we're offering spots on the Christie Debate Team! It's very simple, **[if you chip in $25 or more today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44548538:6iZ5IELDN:m:1:1516426255:CB9BEEEB12766A9CFC4D70562F186605:r)** , we'll send you a signed note from him thanking you for your support.
Peter, **[chip in $25 or more today and join the Christie Debate Team!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44548538:6iZ5IELDN:m:1:1516426255:CB9BEEEB12766A9CFC4D70562F186605:r)**
I look forward to hearing back from you.
Monica Block
****

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318

name: Team Marco
subject: This week on MarcoRubio.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550616:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)
---
| | | | Hi Peter, We've continued to put all kinds of new great content on MarcoRubio.com - covering Marco on the campaign trail, promoting his comprehensive range of policy proposals, and more. Here's some highlights of what we've posted in the last week or so:
---
| |
---
| We released our great third-quarter fundraising numbers last week, and we summed them up in a couple posts for the site. **[Here's a bunch of infographics on all our finance numbers, like this one about the share of new donors:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550617:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550617:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)
---
| **[More here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550617:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)** We also recounted a bunch of the ways our campaign is being as conservative and responsible as we can with the dollars you give us - lots of UberX and Southwest. **[Read up on it here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550618:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)**
---
| |
---
| We aren't surprised by news showing just how worried Democrats are about Marco being the Republican nominee next year. But a report that Bill Clinton says he thinks Democrats have to "destroy" Marco takes things to a new level - it's a must read. **[Find out more here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550619:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)**
---
| |
---
| We're continuing to get as many of Marco's comprehensive policy proposals onto the website. They're split up into explanations of Marco's views on specific issues and explanations of how his policies will affect Americans. Just in the last week, we've added:
* **[Energy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550620:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)**
* [**Second Amendment**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550621:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)
* [**Common Core**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550622:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)
* [**Spending**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550623:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)
* [**Sanctuary Cities**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550624:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)
* [**Seniors**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550625:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)
* **[ISIS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44550626:66QohELNT:m:1:1349778030:210FD2E604A2E36D3090BEF7C4E4C978:r)**

---
| |
---
| We've put up a few great new videos of Marco talking about different topics. Here's a moving answer of his from a recent town hall, about how his faith influences him:
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I support Trey Gowdy. Do You?
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Friend, stand with Trey Gowdy.

Friend,

Have you been watching Hillary Clinton testify in front of Trey
Gowdy and the Benghazi Select Committee today?

Trey's committee has uncovered more facts about what happened in
Benghazi than any other investigation has. They have worked day
and night to cover every detail and ensure that the truth comes
out.

Those who are calling this committee a partisan attack on Hillary
Clinton are simply WRONG. This committee was formed to find out
the truth about the attacks that killed four American men on Sept
11, 2012 in Benghazi.

Trey Gowdy has done an incredible job, and I can't imagine a
better person for this difficult task.

I am proud to call Trey a fellow South Carolinian and a good
friend.

If you join me in supporting Trey's efforts, hard work and
dedication to getting answers about why four Americans died, then
please stand with me RIGHT NOW in Standing with Trey.

Trey and the committee have been preparing for this for months,
and today I hope we will finally get to the bottom of what
happened that fatal night in Benghazi.

Unfortunately, many have taken to making outrageous claims that
this committee was formed to damage Hillary Clinton. Those claims
and allegations could not be further from the truth.

We need to show Trey that he has our full support and will
continue to have it even when the testimony ends.

Please follow this link to add your name to my I Stand with Trey
petition.

In fact, once everything settles down, I will share with him the
names of this petition so he is aware of the support he has from
Americans in every corner of our country.

Please do not delay, and let me and Trey know if you stand with
him.

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

name: Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Today's hearing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary's statement. | Friend --

Today, Hillary is testifying in front of the Benghazi Committee on the tragic loss of four American lives.

Her opening statement was a powerful and moving reflection on what the purpose of today's hearing should be. We've included a few excerpts below -- you can read the statement in full **[here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0).

> _The terrorist attacks at our diplomatic compound and later, at the CIA post in Benghazi, Libya on September 11, 2012 took the lives of four brave Americans: Ambassador Chris Stevens, Sean Smith, Glen Doherty, and Tyrone Woods.
>
> I am here to honor the service of those four men, the courage of the Diplomatic Security agency and the CIA officers who risked their lives that night, and the work their colleagues do every single day all over the world...
>
> I was the one who asked Chris to go to Libya as our envoy. I was the one who recommended him to be our Ambassador to to the President. After the attacks, I stood next to President Obama as Marines carried his casket and those of the other three Americans off the plane at Andrews Air Force Base. I took responsibility. And, as part of that, before I left office, I launched reforms to better protect our people in the field and help reduce the chance of another tragedy happening in the future...
>
> We need leadership at home to match our leadership abroad. Leadership that puts national security ahead of politics and ideology. Our nation has a long history of bipartisan cooperation on foreign policy and national security. Not that we always agree -- far from it -- but we do come together when it counts.
>
> As Secretary of State, I worked with the Republican chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee to pass a landmark nuclear arms control treaty with Russia. I worked with Republican Leader, Senator Mitch McConnell, to open up Burma, now Myanmar, to find democratic change. I know it’s possible to find common ground, because I have done it.
>
> We should debate on the basis of fact, not fear. We should resist denigrating the patriotism or loyalty of those with who we disagree. So I am here. Despite all the previous investigations and all the talk about partisan agendas, I am here to honor those we lost, and to do what I can to aid those who serve us still.
>
> And my challenge to you, members of this Committee, is the same challenge I put to myself.
>
> Let’s be worthy of the trust the American people have bestowed upon us. They expect us to lead. To learn the right lessons. To rise above partisanship and to reach for statesmanship. That’s what I tried to do every day as Secretary of State. And it’s what I hope we all strive for here today and into the future.
> _
For more up-to-date info from the hearing, follow along on **[@HillaryClinton**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) and **[@TheBriefing2016**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0).

Thanks for having Hillary's back today.

Official Clinton Campaign

| **Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM4MTM5MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMjk2NTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
